result.summary: I found a layout overflow issue where multiple UI elements are clipped off the right edge of the screen, making the page look partially cut off on mobile.

issues.description: The rightmost items in the top category row and the game grids are visibly clipped, with labels and thumbnails cut off at the screen edge.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout so cards fit within the viewport or provide clear horizontal scrolling with consistent padding and visible overflow indicators.

issues.description: The top category label is truncated as "Hot Ga...", which makes the tab look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Shorten the label, increase available space, or allow the tab to wrap/resize so the full name is readable.
